title: fumaria capreolata subsp. speciosa
intro: Fumaria capreolata subsp. speciosa, also known as the Venus' charlock or Venus' fumitory, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Fumariaceae. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Fumaria capreolata subsp. speciosa include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
